stories.title: RenderLambda adapter: config, options, start
acceptanceCriteria: src/lambda/index.ts exports RenderLambda(config: LambdaConfig): RenderAdapter<LambdaOptions>
LambdaConfig has region (AwsRegion), functionName, serveUrl; LambdaOptions has framesPerLambda?, webhook?, privacy?, outName?, maxRetries?
start() calls renderMediaOnLambda exactly once with region/functionName/serveUrl/composition=compositionId/codec(default h264)/inputProps + forwarded options
start() returns a handle that round-trips through decodeHandle to {adapter:'lambda', renderId, bucket, ext} where bucket=bucketName and ext=extForCodec(codec)
No StateStore / p-limit anywhere in the lambda path (renders fire immediately)

stories.title: getState maps getRenderProgress per the §4 table
acceptanceCriteria: getState decodes the handle and calls getRenderProgress({renderId, bucketName:bucket, functionName, region})
done===true => {status:'done', progress:1}
fatalErrorEncountered===true => {status:'error', progress:overallProgress, error:errors[0]?.message}
overallProgress>0 (not done, no fatal) => {status:'rendering', progress:overallProgress}
otherwise => {status:'queued', progress:0}

stories.title: getUrl + download from S3
acceptanceCriteria: getUrl returns progress.outputFile (the S3 URL) when present
getUrl throws RenderError('not_found') when outputFile is null (render not ready)
download fetches getUrl and returns response.body as a web ReadableStream
download throws RenderError('adapter_error') on a non-ok fetch / missing body

stories.title: Version-mismatch mapping + error classification
acceptanceCriteria: A Remotion version error thrown by renderMediaOnLambda is rethrown as RenderError with code 'version_mismatch'
Other renderMediaOnLambda failures are rethrown as RenderError with code 'render_failed'
The original error is preserved via the cause option

stories.title: Type-guard + integration + build
acceptanceCriteria: A type-guard test proves our Codec union is assignable to @remotion/lambda's ServerlessCodec
RenderLambda plugs into RenderSdk with options auto-typed; passing chromiumOptions is a compile error (@ts-expect-error)
bun run types => 0 errors; bun run build succeeds; dist/lambda/index.js keeps @remotion/lambda external (0 internals bundled)
bun test => all pass (server suite 56 + new lambda tests), 0 fail
